info.name: crud-api
info.description:
## Overview

This collection contains basic CRUD-style requests for a simple **Tasks & Users** REST API.

Requests are organized into two folders:
- **TASKS** — endpoints under `/tasks`
- **USERS** — endpoints under `/users`

## Base URL (recommended: variable-driven)

Current base URL used across requests:

```text
http://crud-api-task.test/api
```

Recommended setup (so you can switch hosts/environments easily):
- Create an environment or collection variable named `baseUrl`
- Update request URLs to use:

```text
{{baseUrl}}
```

> Active environment in this workspace: **FS** (you can add `baseUrl` there).

---

## TASKS folder

### Create task
- **Request:** [add tasks](request/53229088-05cdf5e0-fea9-4c3d-9aa3-a74be9ac730e)
- **Method/Path:** `POST /tasks`

### List tasks
- **Request:** [display all tasks](request/53229088-1127d452-a8a8-47ec-88e5-c229eacf7848)
- **Method/Path:** `GET /tasks`

### Update task
- **Request:** [update tasks](request/53229088-9b65818c-fd81-447f-8904-6e68fae73de4)
- **Method/Path:** `PUT /tasks/:id`
- **Note:** This request currently uses a placeholder path segment: `/tasks/id_number`. Replace `id_number` with a real task id (or parameterize it as `{{taskId}}`).

### Filter tasks (query example)
- **Request:** [filter task by status](request/53229088-50006bbf-3be5-410e-8c1d-fa11c6cda312)
- **Method/Path:** `GET /tasks?status=pending`
- **Example:** `status=pending`

### Sort tasks (query example)
- **Request:** [sort task by due_date](request/53229088-02586792-4328-451f-a621-e99c96f3fa42)
- **Method/Path:** `GET /tasks?sort=due_date`
- **Example:** `sort=due_date`

### Pagination (query example)
- **Request:** [task pagination](request/53229088-eeac29bf-5ad9-49fd-94ee-53714e4699b8)
- **Method/Path:** `GET /tasks?page=1`
- **Example:** `page=1`

---

## USERS folder

### Create user (misaligned request)
- **Request:** [add user](request/53229088-274523a1-d77f-4f25-97d1-2dd895c8f7ab)
- **Intended Method/Path:** `POST /users`
- **Current behavior:** This request is named **add user** but currently points to `POST /tasks?due_date=in_progress`.
  - The query parameter `due_date=in_progress` also appears inconsistent (a date field vs a status-like value).

### List users
- **Request:** [display all users](request/53229088-23469b6f-bc9c-4e30-9494-2b9e8d16f8c6)
- **Method/Path:** `GET /users`

### Update user
- **Request:** [update user](request/53229088-febbf470-d602-4601-a678-d3c7e460fef8)
- **Method/Path:** `PUT /users/:id`
- **Note:** This request currently hardcodes an id: `/users/14`. Replace with a real id (or parameterize as `{{userId}}`).

### Delete user (two variants)
There are **two separate DELETE requests** named **remove user**:
- [remove user](request/53229088-aaa98c00-7fcd-4e16-9dff-63a3023a564e) — `DELETE /users/[id_number]` (placeholder syntax)
- [remove user](request/53229088-21358b3d-7cae-42f2-8595-e21628173efb) — `DELETE /users/:id`

---

## Other / cleanup notes

- There is a top-level request named [New Request](request/53229088-148617bd-ac44-480e-b291-73966eefc6e8) with **no URL set**.

> This collection description documents what currently exists in the collection. It does not modify any request configuration.

item.name: USERS
item.description:
This folder contains the **User management** endpoints for the CRUD API.

## Endpoints

- **Add user** (`POST`) — Create a new user.
    
- **Display all users** (`GET`) — Retrieve the full list of users.
    
- **Update user** (`PUT /api/users/:id`) — Update an existing user by ID.
    
- **Remove user** (`DELETE /api/users/:id`) — Delete an existing user by ID.
    

## Notes

- Replace `:id` with a valid user ID (e.g., `14`).
    
- If you’re running locally, ensure the base host (`http://crud-api-task.test`) is reachable.

body.raw:
{
    "user_id": 1,
    "title": "CRUD api task",
    "description": "Create a simple REST API using Laravel for managing Users and Tasks",
    "status": "pending",
    "due_date": ""
}
